changelog:
- Audio Streaming: Fixed silent capture issues on fast reconnect by resolving PCM/WebRTC handover race conditions.
- Media Compatibility: Removed audio focus requests entirely to prevent volume ducking and media pausing.
- Camera Reliability: Fixed black image issues by prioritizing logical multi-cameras and flushing residual preview frames before capture. 'Switch Camera' now automatically captures a preview.
- Audio Pickup: Enhanced source rotation to reliably find a working mic path on aggressive OEM ROMs.
- Feature Decommission: 'Record' functionality has been permanently removed.
